descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes tied Juan De Fuca Whalers 8-8 in overtime in a penalty-filled BCJHL game on Wednesday night.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes and Juan De Fuca Whalers played to an 8-8 overtime tie in a penalty-filled BCJHL game on Wednesday night in Richmond. The Sockeyes appeared to have the game secured until penalties left them shorthanded for the final 14 minutes of the third period. The Whalers scored three power-play goals to equalize. Jason Talo scored twice for Richmond; Mauro Padula, Mario Desjardins, Greg Hadden, Keith Fair, Rob Clarke, and Kirk Phare each added singles.

attribution.headline: Richmond Sockeyes and Juan De Fuca Whalers play to 8-8 overtime tie
